title: Loopress project configuration
description: Project-level config for the Loopress CLI (loopress.json).

rootDir.description: Base directory for all Loopress paths. All other path options are resolved relative to this directory.

snippetsDir.description: Directory where code snippets are read from and written to, relative to rootDir.

acfDir.description: Directory where ACF field groups, post types, taxonomies and options pages are read from and written to, relative to rootDir.

rankmathDir.description: Directory where RankMath settings, post meta, and redirects are read from and written to, relative to rootDir.

yoastDir.description: Directory where Yoast SEO settings and post meta are read from and written to, relative to rootDir.

projectId.description: Project identifier from the global Loopress config. When set, takes precedence over the currently active project in the global config.

plugins.description: WordPress.org plugins managed by Loopress. Keys are plugin slugs; values are written as "latest" since installs go through WordPress's native plugin API, which only installs the current version. Older files may still have a pinned version string here from before this was the case; it is read but no longer acted on.
